task_completion.description: Survey is created with the correct title and activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LimeSurvey interface, the survey titled 'Framing Effect Experiment - Cognitive Decision Making Study 2024' is visible and shows an 'Active' status indicator.

task_completion.description: Anonymized responses are enabled and backward navigation is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings (Participant or Presentation settings), 'Anonymized responses' is set to 'On' or 'Yes', and 'Backward navigation' is set to 'Off' or 'No'.

task_completion.description: Five specific question groups are created in the correct order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey structure shows exactly 5 groups: 'Informed Consent and Instructions', 'Scenario A - Disease Outbreak', 'Scenario B - Financial Decision', 'Scenario C - Environmental Policy', and 'Demographics and Debrief'.

task_completion.description: Randomization group 'experimental' is applied to the three scenario groups, but not the consent or demographics groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the group settings or structure overview, the 'Randomization group' field is set to 'experimental' for Scenario A, B, and C. The Consent and Demographics groups have this field left blank.

task_completion.description: At least one question is added to each of the 5 groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey structure tree or question list shows at least one question nested under each of the 5 question groups.

task_completion.description: The questions match the required scenarios and details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question text or previews show: a Yes/No question in the Consent group; a disease scenario mentioning 600 people, 200 saved, and 1/3 chance in Scenario A; a financial scenario mentioning 60 employees in Scenario B; an environmental scenario mentioning 1200 homes in Scenario C; and a demographics question in the final group.

integrity.description: The agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin interface (http://localhost/index.php/admin) being interacted with in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing database injection commands or automated script execution for survey creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Framing Effect Experiment - Cognitive Decision Making Study 2024'. Settings: Backward navigation disabled, Anonymized responses enabled. Groups: Exactly 5 groups ('Informed Consent and Instructions', 'Scenario A - Disease Outbreak', 'Scenario B - Financial Decision', 'Scenario C - Environmental Policy', 'Demographics and Debrief'). Randomization: Scenarios A, B, and C must have the randomization group name 'experimental'. Consent and Demographics groups must NOT be randomized. Questions: At least 1 per group. Scenario A must mention 600 people at risk, Program A saves 200, Program B has 1/3 chance to save all. Scenario B must mention 60 employees. Scenario C must mention 1200 homes.
